## What this does

Brief description of the change.

## Why

The motivation — what problem it solves or what it improves.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `cctx doctor` passes (if you have an Ollama setup)
- [ ] Manual test of affected commands

## Notes for reviewer

Any context that helps review (tricky logic, edge cases, alternatives rejected).
